# Service Agreement Template (Cleaning Services)

> Replace bracketed fields before use.

## 1. Parties

- Provider: **[Legal Business Name]**, located at **[Address]**
- Client: **[Client Legal Name]**, located at **[Address]**
- Effective date: **[YYYY-MM-DD]**

## 2. Services

Provider will perform the cleaning services described in **Schedule A (Scope of Work)**.

## 3. Term and schedule

- Start date: **[YYYY-MM-DD]**
- Frequency: **[One-time / Weekly / Biweekly / Monthly / Custom]**
- Service window: **[Day/Time Range]**

## 4. Fees and payment

- Price: **[Amount + tax details]**
- Invoicing cycle: **[Per visit / Weekly / Monthly]**
- Payment due: **[e.g., Net 15]**
- Accepted payment methods: **[Interac/e-transfer/card/other]**

Late payments may incur **[X]%** interest per month (or as permitted by law).

## 5. Access, utilities, and client responsibilities

Client agrees to provide:

- Safe access to premises
- Reasonable access to water/electricity
- Disclosure of known hazards (biohazard, mold, broken glass, aggressive pets, etc.)

## 6. Supplies and equipment

- [ ] Provider supplies cleaning chemicals and equipment
- [ ] Client supplies specific products/equipment: **[List]**

## 7. Limitations and exclusions

Unless expressly included in Schedule A, services do not include:

- [Example: carpet extraction]
- [Example: high ladder exterior work]
- [Example: hazardous waste removal]

## 8. Health and safety

Provider may refuse or pause services where site conditions are unsafe.

## 9. Insurance and liability

Provider maintains applicable insurance coverage. Liability is limited to direct damages up to **[insert agreed limit]**, except where prohibited by law.

## 10. Cancellations and rescheduling

- Cancellation notice required: **[e.g., 24 hours]**
- Missed/lockout fee: **[Amount or rule]**

## 11. Confidentiality and privacy

Both parties will protect confidential information encountered during service delivery.

## 12. Termination

Either party may terminate with **[X days]** written notice, subject to payment for completed services.

## 13. Governing law

This agreement is governed by the laws of New Brunswick and the applicable laws of Canada.

## 14. Signatures

Provider representative  
Name: **[Name]**  
Title: **[Title]**  
Signature: _______________________  
Date: **[YYYY-MM-DD]**

Client representative  
Name: **[Name]**  
Title: **[Title]**  
Signature: _______________________  
Date: **[YYYY-MM-DD]**
